home.intro: Welcome to my blog. I write about web development, technology, and more.
home.title: Making programming
home.subtitle: Embracing new technologies and sharing modern development experiences.
home.subtitleSecond: Tips, tutorials, and real-world insights to make your coding journey smoother.
home.recentDescription: Fresh perspectives and technical breakdowns from the laboratory.

blog.title: Blog

portfolio.title: About Me
portfolio.intro: Hi, I'm Jam Balaya — a web developer based in Japan. I enjoy Shogi and Mahjong ♟️🀄
portfolio.blogDescription: My personal blog built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Bun, and Biome.
portfolio.ossDescription: I actively contribute to open-source projects including Next.js, Biome, Mise, Dev Containers, and more.
portfolio.subtitle: Full-stack developer, technical writer, and open-source enthusiast.
portfolio.bioText1: I started my journey in a terminal window, tinkering with scripts and falling in love with the craft of building software. Over the years, that curiosity evolved into a career spanning full-stack development, open-source contribution, and technical writing.
portfolio.bioText2: My philosophy for Jam Blog is simple: share what I learn, build tools that matter, and keep the code clean. Whether it's a deep dive into React Server Components or a quick tip on Bun, I write to help developers ship better software.
portfolio.collaborateDescription: I'm open to OSS collaboration and technical discussions.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.body: We respect your privacy. This site does not collect personal information beyond what is necessary for basic functionality. We may use cookies to improve your browsing experience. By using this site, you agree to our use of cookies and our handling of any data as described herein.
